Mtn For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2006-2-A
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Ashley Vigil and James Maze
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Declaratin of Colleen Morgan in Lieu of Live Testimony in support of Default Judgment admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2006-2-A, and against Defaulted Defendant(s)Ashley Vigil and James Maze as follows:

Damages: $32,107.11
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $855.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $32,962.11
